revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Imuheno Shrine
| native_name = 忌部神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Imuheno Shrine
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Imuheno Shrine'''|忌部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|lt=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|qid=Q135009132|1=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q9610964|ltq=Q9610964|qid=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}
* {{ill|Kanpei-sha|lt=Kanpei-sha|simple|Kanpei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)|ja|阿波国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11657514|1=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)}}
** Series ordinal: 18
** P155: {{ill|Q135041319|ltq=Q135041319|qid=Q135041319|1=Yamatoookuni- Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135041330|ltq=Q135041330|qid=Q135041330|1=Amamurakumono Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=Awa Province|be|Ава (правінцыя, Сікоку)|cs|Provincie Awa (Tokušima)|de|Provinz Awa (Tokushima)|en|Awa Province (Tokushima)|es|Provincia de Awa (Tokushima)|fa|ولایت آوا|fr|Province d'Awa (Tokushima)|gl|Provincia de Awa, Tokushima|id|Provinsi Awa (Tokushima)|it|Awa (provincia, Tokushima)|ja|阿波国|ko|아와국 (난카이도)|lt|Avos žemė (Tokušima)|nl|Awa (Tokushima)|pt|Província de Awa (Tokushima)|ru|Ава (Сикоку)|simple|Awa Province (Tokushima)|sk|Awa (provincia, Tokušima)|sr|Провинција Ава (Шикоку)|tr|Awa (vilayet, Tokushima)|uk|Провінція Ава (Шікоку)|zh_min_nan|Awa-kok (Nankaidô)|zh|阿波國|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}}
* {{ill|Q3205811|ltq=Q3205811|qid=Q3205811|1=Oe District, Tokushima}}
